Name: RETARGET_ANIM_SET_PARAM_ST
Description: Defines fields related to animation retargeting.

Fields.Name: Base Animation ID
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to be retargeted

Fields.Name: Retarget Animation ID Beginning
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

Fields.Name: Retarget Animation ID [1]
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

Fields.Name: Retarget Animation ID [2]
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

Fields.Name: Retarget Animation ID [3]
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

Fields.Name: Retarget Animation ID [4]
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

Fields.Name: Retarget Animation ID [5]
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

Fields.Name: Retarget Animation ID [6]
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation

Fields.Name: Retarget Animation ID Ending
Fields.Description: ID of the animation to retarget to the base animation
